testcase.name: test_ai_agent_test_cases_document_exists

failure.message:
AssertionError: TC-AGT-001 should be in content assert 'TC-AGT-001' in '# Where AI Agents Are Heading ## Timeline ```mermaid flowchart LR NOW["2026
Text + tools, single-session"] --> NEAR["2027
Persistent memory, proactive agents"] NEAR --> MID["2028-29
Autonomous dev, self-improving"] MID --> FAR["2030+
Natural language programming"] ``` ## Near Future (2026-2027) - **Persistent Memory**: Agents remember across sessions, learn your preferences - **Proactive Agents**: Monitor apps, auto-fix bugs, suggest improvements without being asked - **Multi-Agent Collaboration**: Frontend + Backend + DevOps agents working as a team ## Medium Future (2028-2029) - **Autonomous Development**: Describe a SaaS in natural language → fully built and deployed - **Self-Improving Agents**: Learn from past sessions globally, adapt to coding styles - **Multimodal Input**: Draw on a whiteboard, voice commands, point-and-say ## Far Future (2030+) - Humans as product managers, agents as the development team - Natural language as the primary programming interface - Self-maintaining, self-evolving applications - The role of "developer" transforms into "director of AI agents" '

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_p0_features.py:289: in test_ai_agent_test_cases_document_exists assert "TC-AGT-001" in content, "TC-AGT-001 should be in content" E AssertionError: TC-AGT-001 should be in content E assert 'TC-AGT-001' in '# Where AI Agents Are Heading ## Timeline ```mermaid flowchart LR NOW["2026
Text + tools, single-session"] --> NEAR["2027
Persistent memory, proactive agents"] NEAR --> MID["2028-29
Autonomous dev, self-improving"] MID --> FAR["2030+
Natural language programming"] ``` ## Near Future (2026-2027) - **Persistent Memory**: Agents remember across sessions, learn your preferences - **Proactive Agents**: Monitor apps, auto-fix bugs, suggest improvements without being asked - **Multi-Agent Collaboration**: Frontend + Backend + DevOps agents working as a team ## Medium Future (2028-2029) - **Autonomous Development**: Describe a SaaS in natural language → fully built and deployed - **Self-Improving Agents**: Learn from past sessions globally, adapt to coding styles - **Multimodal Input**: Draw on a whiteboard, voice commands, point-and-say ## Far Future (2030+) - Humans as product managers, agents as the development team - Natural language as the primary programming interface - Self-maintaining, self-evolving applications - The role of "developer" transforms into "director of AI agents" '
